name: rpn32-monorepo
description: A terminal RPN calculator inspired by the HP 32SII

scripts.clean: pnpm --filter @brnwb/rpn32-core run clean && pnpm --filter @brnwb/rpn32 run clean
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @brnwb/rpn32-core run build && pnpm --filter @brnwb/rpn32 run build
scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @brnwb/rpn32-core run build && pnpm --filter @brnwb/rpn32 run dev
scripts.check: pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run build && pnpm run test
